nodes.name: 麻雀科
nodes.summary: 麻雀科是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联17种鸟类，包括White-browed sparrow-weaver、斑文鳥、Pale rockfinch等17种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-browed sparrow-weaver
nodes.summary: White-browed sparrow-weaver（White-browed sparrow-weaver，学名 Plocepasser mahali），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联3个分布地点节点。

nodes.name: 巴林戈湖
nodes.summary: 巴林戈湖是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括冠翠鸟、African grey flycatcher、White-browed sparrow-weaver等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Andrew Smith (zoologist)
nodes.summary: Andrew Smith (zoologist)是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括Swainson's spurfowl、Swamp nightjar、African barred owlet等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: melanorhynchus, Lake Baringo, Kenya | image2 = White-browed Sparrow Weaver (Plocepasser mahali) (022A-WA03044X0028-0011M0).ogg | image2_caption = Song recorded in southwest Kenya | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | taxon = Plocepasser mahali | authority = Smith, 1836 }} The white-browed sparrow-weaver (Plocepasser mahali) is a predominantly brown, sparrow-sized bird found throughout central and north-central southern Africa. It is found in groups of two to eleven individuals consisting of one breeding pair and other non-reproductive individuals
